THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LAM, ALFRED LOH, REBECCA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TUNAC, CARMEL ALICIA $1,716.63 PRINCIPAL, $254.90 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,971.53, DEFENDANT SHALL RECEIVE A CREDIT AGAINST THE JUDGMENT IN THE AMOUNT OF $376.63 AN AMOUNT WHICH DEFENDANT HAS ALREADY PAID TO PLAINTIFF.
